formInstance.inputDocument:
Kevin Lee
kevin.lee@yahoo.com
555-8901

Dear Professional Association Membership Committee,

I am writing to apply for Corporate Membership with the Professional Association. My name is Kevin Lee, and I am currently working as an Operations Manager at a Manufacturing Co. I hold a Bachelor's Degree in Business Management and have obtained the Six Sigma Green Belt certification. With 3 years of experience in the manufacturing industry, I believe that my background and qualifications align well with the goals and objectives of the Professional Association.

I am interested in becoming a member because I value professional development and networking opportunities. By joining the Professional Association, I hope to expand my knowledge, skills, and connections within the industry. I am committed to continuous learning and growth, and I believe that membership with the Professional Association will provide me with the resources and support needed to advance in my career.

I have chosen to apply for a 2-year Corporate Membership due to my long-term commitment to professional development in the manufacturing industry. I have attached a reference from my former boss, George Adams, who can attest to my work ethic, dedication, and passion for the industry.

I am excited about the possibility of becoming a member of the Professional Association and contributing to the community of professionals within the organization. I look forward to the opportunity to collaborate, learn, and grow with fellow members. Thank you for considering my application.

Sincerely,

Kevin Lee
